title: Better Enhances
description: This is the modpack that you might be looking for cause this has the best vanilla upgrades with being as light as possible. So let me tell your more about this
body:
This is a mod-pack that i created for myself but I thought lets show it to you. So let me present you **Better Enhances**

Here's all it got:

# Mods:
- **Better Third Person** just to make your third person better.
- **Better F3** to make your F4 menu clean and better(also configurable).
- **Cave Dust** make caves more lively when your alone.
- **Clumps** deals with xp orbs to maek your game preformance better.
- **Continuity** connects various textures.
- **Distant Horizon** lets you increaze your render distance without making your game a slide show.
- **Do a barrel roll** lets you glide with your elytra in a way different style (can make you sick).
- **Dynamic Crosshair** makes your crosshair look 100x better.
- **Dynamic Fps** makes your game use less GPU and CPU when in background.
- **Easy Anvils** makes your items show ob the anvil after you leave them in their.
- **Easy Magic** does the same as easy anvils but with enchantment tables.
- **Eating Animations** adds animations for eating.
- **Enhanced Visuals** as the name they enhance visuals just like our modpack.
- **Entity Culling** does recognizes entities that cannot be seen.

There are more which you can see in my youtube video. Not  only mods there are also resourcepacks.

Not any of these mods add anything, these are just for enhancements. Also share this modpack with your friends.

You can also support me on patreon
[My Patreon](https://patreon.com/fourk)

Hope you enjoyed.
